nasb.text: and from among your own selves men will arise, speaking perverse things, to draw away the disciples after them.

esv.text: and from among your own selves will arise men speaking twisted things, to draw away the disciples after them.

cnv.text: 你們自己中間也必有人起來，講些歪曲悖謬的話，引誘門徒跟從他們。

ccb.text: 就是你们中间也会有人起来歪曲真理，引诱门徒跟随他们。

csbs.text: 你们自己当中也会有人起来，讲说一些歪曲的道理，要拉拢门徒跟随他们。
